summary: A 1Password username-field lookup failure in Resolve must surface as an error, symmetric with the password-field lookup, never be silently discarded.
reason: Discarding the username op.FetchField error let a bad username_field with a valid password_field resolve to an empty username with no error, so reserve --submit --yes could skip authentication silently even though 1Password was configured.
validated_outcome: go test ./internal/config passes; Resolve returns an error and leaves username unset when the configured 1Password username field fetch fails.
